extracted_information: ID.me offers age verification services primarily aimed at enabling brands to target specific age groups, prevent fraud, offer exclusive discounts, and adhere to legal age limits. They verify Seniors (50+), Millennials (22-37), Adults 21+, and custom age segments. Verification methods include checking personal information against authoritative databases and manual review of uploaded documents (driver’s licenses, passports) at a secure U.S.-based facility. The service provides superior fraud protection, a frictionless customer experience (seamless in-cart, 2-click re-verification), and is easy to deploy with a scalable, developer-friendly API.

specifications.technical_requirements: ID.me's technology is simple to integrate, utilizing a scalable API that integrates with any platform and is developer friendly. No specific technical prerequisites (e.g., software versions, hardware) are detailed in the content.

pricing.model: Not specified in the provided content.

features.name: Targeted Age Segment Verification
features.description: Empowers brands to drive customer acquisition and brand loyalty within specific age groups.
benefits: Ensures adherence to age limits required by law

segments.market_data: 76 million Americans over 50 control 70% of nation’s disposable income; 5–10% of marketing geared towards them.
Spend $600 billion in US annually; 54% make online purchases.

segments.description: Common threshold for lawful purchase of regulated items.
Ability to verify any age bracket important to the business.

methods.description: Customers input name and date of birth, which ID.me checks against multiple authoritative databases.
Users upload images of driver’s licenses, passports, and other identity documents. ID.me team manually reviews documents every 60 seconds.

features.name: Superior Fraud Protection
features.description: Detects fraudulent verification attempts and abuse, protecting exclusive discounts from ineligible customers and unauthorized resellers.

features.name: Frictionless Customer Experience
features.description: Seamless in-cart age verification. For repeat purchases, re-verification is 2-clicks without re-entering data.

features.name: Easy to Deploy
features.description: Technology is simple to integrate and can be completed in a few days.
